originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Debugging Prioritized Experience Replay in PufferLib for Neural MMO Mazes
summary: Debugged a prioritized experience replay implementation in PufferLib for Neural MMO. Tested on procedurally generated maze tasks with sparse rewards and observed improved performance on single maps but not on domain-randomized ones. Investigated advantage-based prioritization and value function training.
